newsSince: No material new company-specific news since June 9. Q3 FY26 results (net income $3.3m / $0.23 EPS, backlog $179.5m, defense backlog +~20% and ~15% of total, Marine & Propulsion sales +20%, gross margin 28.1%) were reported before the window. No fresh order, contract or guidance announcement since June 9.

verdicts.rankRationale: Latent spillover thesis (transmissions/clutches into robotics-automation and specialty-cooling machinery) is unchanged; no new fundamental evidence since June 9 and the strong Q3 print predates the window. The +11% move and +38% YTD is price, not news; hold the strict-screen rank 6.
verdicts.bull: Growing backlog ($179.5m) with defense up ~20% and Veth/marine strength; control/transmission tech could spill into robotics-automation machinery.
verdicts.neutral: Healthy recovery, but AI/robotics linkage is inferential and the strict screen demands harder evidence.
verdicts.bear: Microcap with no direct AI revenue; cyclical marine/industrial demand and thin liquidity dominate fundamentals.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Latent AI link unproven; marine/industrial cyclicality
